_comment: Month is 2027-02 (28 days, non-leap -- matches the existing AvailabilityService test suite's FEB_2027 fixture). Cell d01 = "AD" contains an illegal shift letter ('D' is not in A/B/C) -- AvailabilityCsvCellError('d01', ...), a per-row error (framing itself is fine: field count matches the header).
call: AvailabilityService.importCsv(csvText, month, companyId) -- requires a pre-existing worker with nationalId 009000019 under companyId

setup.note: seed a worker with this nationalId under the company the import is run for
